properties.name: 6532 Myron Ave
properties.address_full: 6532 Myron Avenue, St. Louis, MO, USA
properties.marketing_message: Welcome home to 6532 Myron Avenue! This charming 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom home in the Normandy Schools Collaborative district offers a fresh start in a convenient location. With approximately 914 square feet, this updated home boasts beautiful hardwood floors, a full unfinished basement, and a large backyard perfect for relaxation and entertaining. Enjoy the comfort of central AC and the convenience of included appliances (refrigerator, stove & oven) and laundry hookups. You'll love the walk-out basement and off-street parking. This home is close to shopping and highways, making your commute and errands a breeze. Pets are welcome with a pet fee and additional pet rent. Don't miss out on this fantastic opportunity to rent a lovely home!

properties.name: 2307 Menett Avenue
properties.address_full: 2307 Menett Avenue, St. Louis, MO, USA
properties.marketing_message:
Welcome home to 2307 Menett Avenue in the heart of St. Louis! This charming, updated 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom home offers 884 square feet of comfortable living space, perfect for anyone seeking a cozy and convenient lifestyle. Enjoy easy off-street parking and a spacious, updated kitchen with a dishwasher, refrigerator, and stove & oven. This home boasts central AC to keep you cool year-round and features laundry hookups for added convenience. The large backyard is ideal for relaxing or entertaining, and the full unfinished basement provides ample storage space.

Enjoy easy access to everything, with shopping and major highways just moments away. Located in the highly regarded Normandy Schools Collaborative school district, this property is a fantastic choice for those seeking a quality education for their children.

This home is move-in ready and features modern touches throughout, including tile floors. Pet-friendly with a pet fee and additional pet rent, making it a welcoming place for your whole family. Don't miss out on this opportunity to make 2307 Menett Avenue your new home! Schedule your showing today.

properties.name: 511 Lynn Haven Lane
properties.address_full: 511 Lynn Haven Lane, Hazelwood, MO, USA
properties.marketing_message:
Welcome to your new home at 511 Lynn Haven Lane in desirable Hazelwood! This updated and move-in-ready 3-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom home offers a comfortable living experience in a fantastic location. Enjoy 912 square feet of living space, featuring beautiful hardwood floors and a thoughtfully designed layout. The home boasts a full, unfinished basement, offering ample storage space or the potential to customize to your needs.

Enjoy the convenience of central AC, a fully equipped kitchen with a dishwasher, refrigerator, and stove & oven, plus the added convenience of laundry hookups. Step outside onto your covered porch and relax in your large backyard - perfect for entertaining or enjoying quiet evenings. Additional features include an attached garage and off-street parking.

Located in the highly-regarded Hazelwood School District, this home is close to everything you need, including shopping, dining, and major highways, making your commute a breeze. Don't miss this opportunity to rent a beautiful home in a prime location. Pets are welcome with a pet fee and additional pet rent. Schedule your showing today!
